# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImageController < ApplicationController
  def process_image
    file = params[:file]
    format = params[:format] || 'jpg'
    size = params[:size] || '640x480'

    if file.present?
      temp_file = Tempfile.new(['image', ".#{format}"])
      begin
        system("convert #{file.path} -resize #{size} #{temp_file.path}")
        send_file(temp_file.path, type: format, disposition: 'inline')
      ensure
        temp_file.close!
        temp_file.unlink
      end
    else
      render plain: "No file uploaded", status: :bad_request
    end
  end
end
